contactCta.heading: Ready to Transform Your Hotel Experience?
contactCta.subtext: Whether you're booking for a team of 10 or managing a portfolio of 50 hotels, we're here to help.

about.heading: About Hotel Market Pro
about.body: Hotel Market Pro is the B2B platform connecting corporate travel buyers with premium business hotels. We simplify group bookings, negotiate competitive rates, and ensure every stay meets corporate standards.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.body: To make corporate hotel bookings as simple as booking a single room — while delivering better rates, better service, and complete transparency.

items.title: Simplicity
items.desc: Book group rooms in under 3 clicks with our streamlined platform.

items.title: Savings
items.desc: Corporate-negotiated rates that save 15-30% versus direct booking.

items.title: Trust
items.desc: Every hotel in our network is vetted for corporate service standards.

items.title: Support
items.desc: Dedicated account managers and 24/7 support for group travel.

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.desc: Fill out a brief form with your hotel details and corporate readiness checklist.

steps.title: Demo Call
steps.desc: Our team walks you through the platform and answers your questions.

steps.title: Agreement
steps.desc: Review and sign the partnership agreement with transparent terms.

steps.title: Listing Activation
steps.desc: Your hotel goes live on the platform and starts receiving corporate inquiries.

cta.heading: Ready to Grow Your Corporate Revenue?
cta.subtext: Join 200+ hotels already generating corporate revenue through our platform.

caseStudies.heading: Success Stories
caseStudies.subheading: See how hotels and companies are thriving with Hotel Market Pro

items.quote: Partnering with Hotel Market Pro transformed our corporate business. We went from 15% to 52% corporate occupancy in just six months.
items.name: Carlos Ramírez
items.results: Corporate revenue tripled, repeat booking rate hit 78%, and the hotel earned a 4.8-star corporate rating.

items.quote: The platform brought us clients we never could have reached on our own. The onboarding was seamless.
items.name: Ana López
items.results: Corporate segment grew 130%, average daily rate increased 22%, and guest satisfaction score rose to 4.7/5.

cta.heading: Want Results Like These?
cta.subtext: Join our partner network and start growing your corporate revenue today.
